subcodes.first_line: O my God! I lay my brow upon the threshold of Thy sanctity and at the gate of Thine oneness, and with a palpitating heart I call upon Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا الهی انی اضع جبینی علی عتبه قدسک و فناء باب احدیتک و ادعوک بقلب خافق
subcodes.subjects: @wisdom [hikmat], @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @prayer for teaching, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
